commentary: Proud of our 8th graders for wrapping up their first round of high school course planning this week. Watching students set goals for themselves never gets old. #SchoolCounseling

A few simple ways families can support a middle schooler's social/emotional wellbeing this spring: keep routines steady, check in without fixing, and celebrate small wins. Grateful for the parents who partner with us at Henrico Fields.
Wonderful day at the Virginia school counselors meetup learning new small-group strategies. Always energizing to connect with fellow educators across the Richmond area. #VirginiaEducation
